summary: At each supplied join on a finished master, measure the numeric join heuristics — RMS before/after/jump, click ratio, frame-diff. Numbers only; which joins are DEFECTS (the flag thresholds) is the brain's.

parity.note: The heuristics are ffmpeg-decoded audio RMS/click ratios and a downscaled frame-diff — deterministic for identical input bytes on a pinned build, with sub-dB jitter across ffmpeg minors, so numeric(0.5). No THRESHOLD crosses: the op returns raw per-join numbers and boundary_qc.py applies CLICK_RATIO_MIN / RMS_JUMP_DB / FRAME_JUMP on the brain to turn them into flags. WHICH joins to inspect is discovered on the brain (cut segments + b-roll plan) and arrives as data.

boundaries.description: The joins to inspect on the master timeline, each {index, t, kind}. Discovered on the brain from the cut segments + b-roll plan (mechanical arithmetic, not a decision). The measurement is per-join; the verdict thresholds stay off this list by construction.
